scroll_found.title: Research the Electrical Engineering scroll at a Research Pedestal

laser_cutter.title: Build and use a Create: New Age Laser Cutter — precision FE-powered cutting for advanced recipes

subtitle.text: The Laser Cutter shapes what the Crusher cannot. Precision manufacturing is the last frontier of the machine age.

description: CH.10 · ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING
▸ Electrical Engineering covers the advanced
applications of Create: New Age.
FE is not just a power source.
It is a precision manufacturing tool.
◈ LASER CUTTER
└ FE-powered precision cutting station
└ Cuts: glass, metal plates, specific circuit boards
└ Required for: some nuclear-age crafting recipes
└ Power requirement: ~400 FE/t sustained
└ Place filter on cutter to automate specific cuts
◈ ELECTRIC MOTOR APPLICATIONS
└ Run Create machines off FE directly
(no shaft connection needed — indirect via motor)
└ Useful for: farms powered by solar array FE
when rotational shafting would be impractical
└ Stack multiple motors for higher SU output
└ Best use: remote outpost machines powered via
wire coil network from main base reactor
◈ BATTERY BOX NETWORK
└ CNA Battery Box: stores FE buffer
Charge overnight (solar), discharge during build
└ Chain multiple boxes for large FE reserves
└ Essential for: Laser Cutter burst demand spikes
◈ SCROLL: Electrical Engineering
└ Found in advanced Create laboratory chests,
engineer workshop structures (high tier)
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: Laser Cutter operation, battery network,
advanced Electric Motor applications
▸ The machine age began with waterwheels.
It ended with the Laser Cutter.
Everything in between was infrastructure.
The Cutter is where you stopped building toward
and started building with.
▶ Find The Electrical Engineering scroll [check]
▶ Build a Laser Cutter [check]
◇ Laser Cutter + Nuclear Reactor FE feed
= automated precision manufacturing.
Set it up before Ch11 boss prep begins.
